25-01/2013-ड-ड--III] अवनीश कुमार अवःथी, संयु;त सिचव MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th November, 2013 S.O. 3533(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub- sections (1) and (3) of Section 3 of the Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992 (34 of 1992), the Central Government hereby appoints the following persons as members in the General Council of Rehabilitation Council of India and for that purpose makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, number S.O. 2479 (E), dated the 18th October, 2008, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, namely :— In the said notification, for serial numbers (13), (19) & (26) and entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely :— Appointed under clause (f) of sub-section (3) of section 3 : (13) Shri Sunkara Sreenivas, Member Vice Chairman, Human Resource Development Society, F. No. 402, MBR Residency, St. No. 5, Lane No. 4, Bharkatpura, Hyderabad - 27. Appointed under clause (g) of sub-section (3) of section 3 : (19) Dr. Manisha Aggarwal, Member House No.10, Sector-1, Ambala City, Haryana- 134003 Appointed under clause (i) of sub-section (3) of section 3 : (26) Dr. Saroj Thapa, Member Education Development Specialist, (Head Teacher Development), Universal Learn Today, India Today Group, No. 6, President Estate, Talkatora Road, New Delhi- 110004 [F.No.25-01/2013-DD.III] AWANISH KUMAR AWASTHI, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
